title: Logistics/Fulfillment Professional
description:
Join One of Australia’s Fastest Growing Modern Furniture Brands!



At Life Interiors, we’re passionate about making great design accessible to all. As one of Australia’s most rapidly expanding homeware and furniture brands, we’re committed to delivering exceptional experiences—for both our customers and our team.



The Role:



Reporting into the Logistics Team Leader, the Logistics Professional will support customers, customer service and delivery activities by ensuring customer’s orders are processed for delivery with the appropriate courier partner in a timely manner. The focus will be on order fulfilment and supply chain activities, as well as assisting with adhoc requests from the Sales and Customer Service teams.



What you’ll be doing:



* Contributing to a positive and high performing team

* Exceeding Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

* Scheduling of outgoing shipments

* Preparing shipping labels

* Determining methods of shipping for adhoc/non-standard orders

* Obtain freight quotes from various carriers in a timely manner

* Maintaining all computerised shipping and distribution records

* Troubleshoots shipping issues and customer complaints that arise and work to solve them to a high standard

* Identify and raise logistics issues quickly

* Maintaining positive & constructive relationships with all stakeholders

* Rolling up your sleeves and helping answer
s, calls & live chats if/when required

* Adhoc requests as directed by management

* Comfortable using a time-tracker



What we are looking for:



* At least 2 years of experience in logistics, fulfillment, or supply chain management.

* Bachelor’s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, Business Administration, or a related field (preferred but not always required).

* Strong understanding of inventory management, order processing, and warehouse operations.

* Excellent organizational and problem-solving skills.

* Strong attention to detail and ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment.

* Knowledge of shipping regulations, carrier coordination, and customs procedures (if applicable).

* Ability to work collaboratively with vendors, suppliers, and internal teams.

* Good communication and customer service skills.

* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel and Word)



What We Offer:



* Salary offered: 35k depending on experience

* 13th month performance based bonus paid in December

* Annual performance and salary review every June

* HMO with an additional dependent

* 10 days Vacation leave

* 5 days Sick leave

* 3 days additional PTO (Christmas day, New Year’s day, & Good Friday)

* Full-time day shift (9:00 am to 6:00 pm - Australian Eastern Daylight Time (AEDT))

* Permanent work from home set-up

title: Customer Experience Professional
description:
Join one of Australia’s Fastest Growing Modern Furniture Brands!



At Life Interiors, we’re passionate about making great design accessible to all. As one Australia’s most rapidly expanding homeware and furniture brand, we’re committed to delivering exceptional experiences for both our customers and our team.



The role



We are seeking a proactive and customer-focused individual to join our team as a Customer Service Representative. This role will emphasize building and maintaining strong, long-term relationships with our customers. The ideal candidate will possess excellent communication skills, a positive attitude, and a passion for ensuring customer satisfaction while fostering loyalty and trust.



What you’ll be doing:



*Customer Relationship Management: Develop and maintain strong, lasting relationships with customers to enhance their

experience with the company. Ensure customers feel valued, heard, and well-supported throughout their journey.

*Issue Resolution: Act as the primary point of contact for customer inquiries, concerns, or issues. Respond promptly and

effectively to ensure customer satisfaction.

*Proactive Outreach: Reach out to existing customers to ensure continued satisfaction, gather feedback, and identify

opportunities for improvements in products or services.

*Customer Retention: Implement strategies and best practices to drive customer retention, resolve complaints effectively,

and maximize overall satisfaction.

*Customer Education: Provide clear and concise information about products or services ensuring customers understand all

offerings and are equipped to make informed decisions.

*Feedback Collection: Collect and analyze customer feedback to identify trends, needs, and areas for improvement,

collaborate with other departments to address concerns.

*Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with sales, marketing, and product teams to ensure customers’ needs are met and that customer feedback is communicated effectively to relevant teams.

*Reporting and Documentation: Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, transactions, and feedback using CRM

tools or customer service platforms.



Great to have:



*Independent and able to work minimal training or supervision, quickly learning new tasks and systems.

*Strong attention to detail, skilled at identifying the root cause of customer issues and resolving them accurately in

accordance with established processes.

*Ability to remain focused, effective, and make sound decisions in challenging situations.

*Demonstrate strong time management skills and be able to handle several customer requests or tasks at the same time

without affecting the quality of service.

*Adaptive, can adjust to new priorities, and use new tools or processes easily.

*Assertive and can confidently provide and receive constructive feedback with management in a clear, direct, and respectful manner, without fear of rejection or conflict.

* We also welcome those who were previously employed by Temple and Webster, Lounge Lovers and other Australian Furniture experience (A huge plus!)







What we are looking for:



*Proven experience in customer service, relationship management, or a similar role.

*Excellent communication skills (both verbal and written).

*Strong interpersonal skills with an ability to build rapport with customers and internal teams.

*Ability to handle difficult or sensitive situations with tact and professionalism.

*Problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically and creatively.

*Familiarity with CRM systems and other customer service software is preferred.

*Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

*Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

*High level of empathy and emotional intelligence to relate to customer needs and concerns.



What We Offer:



*Salary offered: TBD depending on experience

*13th month performance based bonus paid in December

*Annual performance and salary review every June

*HMO with an additional dependent

*10 days Vacation leave

*5 days Sick leave

*3 days additional PTO (Christmas day, New Year’s day, & Good Friday)

*Full-time day shift (9:00 am to 6:00 pm - Australian Eastern Daylight Time (AEDT))

title: Outbound Cold Email Marketing, LinkedIn, SEO & Social Media Virtual Assistant
description:
Q3 Interactive is seeking a highly capable Virtual Assistant to support outbound lead generation, SEO, and social media marketing for a U.S.-based digital agency seeking more qualified leads fro
dical device, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies. We specialize in building visual sales tools for medical device, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies to explain complicated processes through 3D Animation, video production, mobile app development, website design and programming, graphic design and illustration, and AR/VR environments for product demos.



We are a small studio based in Utah (USA) (Mountain time zone [GMT-7]), with a distributed workforce of 3D artists and Full-stack programmers scattered throughout India.



This VA role blends lead generation, content visibility, and campaign execution. You will help drive both outbound pipeline and inbound awareness, working directly with the President & CEO.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can execute across multiple marketing channels, take ownership of results, and earn consistent incentive bonuses for booking meetings with the CEO. If these meetings result in new business, you earn even MORE.



- Targeted, filtered, qualified, verified

, Trusted Leads)

s ? LinkedIn posts

 performance (open/reply rates)

, and LinkedIn

title: Mass Messaging Specialist
description:
Please Apply Here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly disciplined and detail-oriented Messaging Operations Specialist to join our growth team. In this role, you are the engine room of our messaging department — accountable for the flawless execution, scheduling, and delivery of mass messaging campaigns and retention sequences.



You will be handling multiple creator accounts daily, with high message volume.



Your job is to take proven strategy and high-converting copy and ensure it reaches the right audience at the exact right time.



This is a pure execution role — not a strategy or creative position. If you pride yourself on speed, accuracy, and never missing a deadline, this role is built for you.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

> Campaign Execution - Schedule and send all mass messaging across assigned creator accounts based on the daily and weekly plan.

> Funnel Maintenance - Update and manage nudge sequences and automated follow-ups to ensure no lead goes cold.

> Retention Campaigns - Execute re-subscription and win-back campaigns based on targeting and instructions provided.

> Reporting - Track and log execution metrics to ensure all campaigns are deployed accurately and on time.

> SOP Adherence - Follow strict internal workflows to maintain consistency, accuracy, and account safety at all times.



WHO YOU ARE

> Highly Organized - You rely on systems, checklists, and precision. Nothing slips through the cracks.

> Reliable & Fast - You execute quickly without sacrificing accuracy. Deadlines are non-negotiable for you.

> Instruction-Focused - You follow SOPs exactly — no guesswork, no improvisation. You execute what's given.

> Detail-Oriented - You double-check links, pricing, targeting, and timing before every single send.

> Tech-Savvy - You navigate tools and platforms efficiently with a stable setup and reliable internet.





SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE

Performance is measured by three things:

•  On-time campaign execution

•  Zero-error sends

•  Consistent daily output volume



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

> Base Salary $400 – $600 / month (depending on experience)

> Performance Bonus - Based on execution quality, accuracy, and consistency

> Tenure Growth - Salary increases tied to consistent performance over time

> Growth Path - Opportunity to move into QA, QM, or higher operational roles



We invest in people who show up, execute consistently, and take ownership of their output. Strong performers have a clear path to grow within the operation.

—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Trial Reel Account Manager (Instagram Posting & Analytics) – Female Only
description:
As a Trial Reel Account Manager at SimplexMedia, you will be responsible for high-volume scheduling and posting of content on Instagram, specifically for trial reel-only clients. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at speed while maintaining accuracy.



You will manage mass posting (up to 8 posts per client per day) and support the team by helping track and interpret basic performance analytics.



Please note: this role is execution and analytics-focused and does not involve content strategy or content creation.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Posting & Account Management (Instagram)



Schedule and publish high-volume Instagram content (up to 8 posts per client daily)



Ensure all posts are uploaded accurately, on time, and in the correct format



Follow Instagram optimisation processes when setting up and managing accounts



Monitor trial accounts daily to ensure posting consistency and performance



Quality Assurance



Conduct daily quality checks across all assigned client accounts:



Are Instagram accounts set up correctly?



Are posts scheduled and published properly?



Are all required settings and optimisations in place?



Troubleshoot posting issues quickly and escalate when needed



Analytics Support



Track and record basic Instagram performance data for trial reel clients



Help identify trends in engagement and reel performance



Assist in compiling simple analytics reports for internal review



Administration & Communication



Keep all tasks and account updates tracked in Notion daily



Maintain clear communication with the team via Slack and



Stay on top of assigned administrative tasks and deadlines



Support other operational tasks as required by the General Manager/CEO



Further details will be provided during onboarding.



RESULTS



Accurate, consistent Instagram posting with no major errors



All trial clients receive their full daily posting volume



Performance data is properly tracked and available for review



Issues are communicated early and resolved efficiently



All tasks are documented and updated daily in Notion

title: Fashion Designer (Streetwear Designer)
description:
We’re looking for a Fashion Designer (Streetwear Designer) to join our team and take ownership of designing original streetwear garments from concept through to production.



This is NOT a graphic design role. You will be responsible for designing full garments — including silhouettes, fits, fabric selection, and trims — not just prints.



You will work closely with our team to develop cohesive collections across key product categories including denim, hoodies, t-shirts, cargo shorts, pants, and nylon garments.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Design streetwear garments from scratch (hoodies, jackets, pants, denim pieces, etc.)

 • Develop silhouettes, fits, and construction details

 • Select appropriate fabrics, materials, and trims

 • Create detailed, production-ready tech packs

 • Use Adobe Illustrator to produce print-ready garment designs and technical drawings

 • Collaborate with manufacturers to ensure designs are feasible and production-ready

 • Stay ahead of streetwear trends while contributing original design direction



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in streetwear fashion design

 • Strong understanding of garment construction, fit, and materials

 • Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (essential)

 • Ability to create print-ready designs and detailed tech packs

 • Experience designing across categories like denim, hoodies, t-shirts, and pants

 • Strong attention to detail and production knowledge



Bonus:

 • Experience working with overseas manufacturers

 • Understanding of sampling and production processes

 • Passion for modern streetwear culture and trends

title: Finance Officer (Accounts Payable, Receivable, Procurement)
description:
Full-time- 40hrs/week

AU Business Hours (8:30 AM – 5:00 PM AEST)

$350/week



We are looking for a detail-oriented Finance Officer to join our growing international team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, improving processes, and managing financial operations in a structured environment. 



You will be responsible for supporting the finance team by managing accounts payable, accounts receivable, and procurement processes, ensuring invoices, payments, and financial records are handled accurately and on time.



This is a remote role working with an established international company with a collaborative and professional culture.



What You'll Do:



Accounts Payable

- Review and process supplier invoices

- Manage weekly payment runs

- Reconcile supplier invoices and statements

- Ensure invoices are coded correctly and approved

- Maintain organized invoice records

- Support month-end financial processes

- Coordinate with internal teams and external vendors





Procurement Support

- Raise purchase orders

- Assist in supplier sourcing and RFP preparation

- Maintain supplier databases

- Support supplier evaluation and onboarding





Accounts Receivable

- Process and allocate customer payments

- Reconcile payments with banking and accounting systems

- Maintain customer debtor accounts

- Assist with resolving payment discrepancies







What We're Looking For:



Required Skills & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business

- Proven experience in Accounts Payable

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and bookkeeping

- Experience handling high-volume invoices

- Strong Excel skills

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment





Highly Preferred

- Experience using SAP or similar ERP systems

- Experience with financial reconciliation

- Experience supporting procurement processes

- Experience working with international finance teams



Key Traits for Success

We are looking for someone who is:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Organized and able to meet deadlines

- A strong communicator with internal and external stakeholders

- Comfortable handling large volumes of financial data

- Proactive in improving processes





Why Join Us?

- Stable long-term remote opportunity

- Work with an experienced global finance team

- Structured processes and supportive leadership

- Opportunity to grow within an international company



To Apply:

- Share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. How many years of Accounts Payable, Receivable and procurement experience do you have?

2. Which accounting or ERP systems have you used?

3. You receive a supplier invoice for $5,200, but the Purchase Order is $5,000 and the goods receipt shows $5,000.

What steps would you take before approving the invoice for payment?

4. A supplier statement shows 5 outstanding invoices, but your accounting system only shows 3 invoices recorded.

What would you do to reconcile this?

5. Why is it important to reconcile Accounts Payable before month-end closing, and what problems can happen if this is not done?

title: Junior Graphic Designer (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok, Kiosk Design)
description:
URGENT HIRING



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



As our team graphic designer you’ll play a key role in designing for viral Korean brands like Beauty of JoseonNeedly, Tirtir, etc, turning creative concepts into market-leading visuals. If you're looking for stability, a global perspective, and a place to truly belong, your next chapter starts here.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design engaging visual content including social media posts, banners, flyers, and other marketing materials.

- Ensure all designs align with the company’s brand guidelines and visual identity.

- Collaborate closely with marketing, and other internal teams to understand project goals and requirements.

- Manage multiple design projects simultaneously while meeting strict deadlines.

- Revise and improve designs based on team and client feedback.

- Provide basic administrative support when needed.

- Handle technical design tasks, including cosmetic kiosk sizing and layout adjustments.

- Provide basic administrative support when needed.



Qualifications:

- Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Photoshop, Canva, or similar tools.

- With a strong portfolio showcasing your design skills and creativity.

- With experience as an E-commerce Graphic Designer is a plus.

- Strong creative thinking and problem-solving skills.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with others.

- Ability to prioritize tasks and perform well under pressure.

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

- Openness to receiving constructive feedback and making improvements.



Benefits:

- Stable full time with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Opportunity to be part of a growing team and Korean Beauty Brands.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

title: AI Video Editor – Supplement Brand (Long-Term)
description:
We're looking for a skilled AI video editor to own our AI UGC creation process end-to-end. We currently use HeyGen + ElevenLabs, but want to push the quality to a genuinely hyperrealistic level.



What the work looks like

Taking viral TikTok clips and recreating them with a new AI actor, adjusted script, and matched pacing, relaunched as
 ads. Building VSLs with sourced B-roll that's visually congruent with the script. 30+ videos to start, with long-term volume for the right person.



You need to know your way around

HeyGen, ElevenLabs, and Higgsfield. B-roll sourcing and visual storytelling. Pacing, lip sync, and realism, the details that make or break believability.



What we care about

We're not just hiring for a batch of videos. We're building a long-term working relationship, so we're selective. We need someone who is reliable, deadline-driven, and proactive about quality, someone who watches their own output critically and keeps improving.



What you can expect

$10-15 per video in the first month, with a performance bonus kicking in from month two. You'll also get access to 15+ hours of high level video editing course content, and a reliable long-term relationship with consistent workload.



To apply

Send us your portfolio with only relevant work, along with a short introduction about yourself and why you think you'd be a great fit. We want to get to know you as a person, so keep it real. AI-written proposals will be filtered out.

title: Senior Full-Stack Product Integration Engineer - Trading Platform + Gateway + Chart + Voice
description:
We’re building Wealthy, a modern trading product that combines a frontend app, chart system, backend gateway, and AI voice layer into one customer-ready experience.



This is not a generic CRUD app role.



We need a strong engineer who can work across the integration layer and help turn an already-built foundation into a more stable, customer-ready product.



What you’ll work on



You’ll help stabilize and integrate:



Frontend app built with React/Vite

Chart layer and chart embedding/integration

Backend/gateway built with Node/TypeScript

Realtime / stateful system behavior across auth, session, connection, and data flow

Voice service integration using a prepared Python/FastAPI voice prototype

Current stack

React / Vite / TypeScript

Node.js / Express / TypeScript

WebSocket / realtime data flow

Chart-heavy product UI

Python / FastAPI

Redis

Docker

What we need from this hire



The first contract is focused on making the first customer-ready product slice feel cohesive and reliable.



In scope

Stabilize frontend + chart integration

Improve app state truth across auth / connection / feed status

Harden the canonical backend/gateway

Improve diagnostics, reliability, and maintainability

Wrap the working voice prototype into a production-ready service

Help make frontend, charts, gateway, and voice work together cleanly

Out of scope for the first engagement

Full integration of 31 expert/agent modules

OMS / live order routing / execution stack

Major repo restructuring or renaming

Big visual redesign

You are a strong fit if you have

Must-have

Strong TypeScript experience

Strong Node.js / Express backend experience

Solid React / Vite frontend experience

Experience with stateful systems and debugging auth/session/data-flow issues

Experience with WebSockets or realtime systems

Ability to productionize Python / FastAPI services

Ability to work inside an existing codebase without trying to rewrite everything

Nice-to-have

Trading platform or market-data experience

Chart-heavy UI experience

Redis + Docker experience

FastAPI inference/TTS service experience

Experience with gateway/backend systems that sit between UI and external providers

Rithmic or exchange/API integration exposure

Voice scope



We already have a working voice prototype.

We are not looking for a voice-model researcher.



We are looking for someone who can:



wrap the voice system into a production-ready FastAPI service

add Docker, health checks, logging, and Redis caching

support endpoints like:

/tts/generate

/tts/stream

/health

/voices

/tts/batch

integrate the voice service cleanly into the existing product stack

What success looks like



A strong first engagement would result in:



cleaner frontend/chart/gateway integration

more reliable backend/gateway behavior

clearer state truth and diagnostics

production-ready voice service wrapping

a tighter, more customer-ready product experience

How we work



We care about:



clean thinking

practical debugging

stable implementation

low-ego communication

working with the current architecture instead of blowing it up



We do not want someone who immediately wants to rewrite the whole stack.



To apply, send:

A short intro about your background

Your most relevant experience for this role

Examples of similar work:

frontend/backend integration

realtime systems

chart-heavy apps

FastAPI services

TTS or inference-service integration

Your hourly rate or preferred pricing

Your weekly availability

How you would approach a first contract like this

Any questions you’d want answered before starting

Bonus points



Include a short note on:



how you debug confusing state issues across frontend and backend

how you would approach integrating a prepared voice service into an existing product.  Tell me about a product where you had to stabilize both frontend and backend integration, not just build one side.

Have you worked with WebSockets, realtime feeds, or stateful session systems?

Have you worked on chart-heavy products or trading/financial apps?

Have you productionized a Python/FastAPI service before?

How do you handle joining an existing codebase with mixed legacy and active modules?

What would be your first step when debugging a system where the frontend says one thing and the backend/data source says another?

Are you comfortable working on a product that includes React/Vite, Node/TypeScript, charts, and voice-service integration?

title: Architect & Design Collective Intake
description:
Job Title: Architect & Design Collective Intake

Organization: Indigenous Just Transition (IJT)

Location: Remote (Open to applicants fro
xico, Philippines, Central America, and South America)

Job Type: Project-Based / Freelance / Collaborative Opportunities



About Indigenous Just Transition (IJT)



We are not just designing buildings—we are restoring relationships between land, culture, and future generations.



Indigenous Just Transition (IJT) is an Indigenous-led organization building regenerative infrastructure, cultural spaces, and land-based projects across communities. Our work centers on honoring Indigenous sovereignty while co-creating spaces that reflect culture, ecology, and long-term stewardship.



Who We’re Looking For



We are inviting architects, designers, and spatial thinkers to join a growing international design ecosystem. We especially encourage applicants fro
xico, Central America, and South America who are aligned with the following values:



-Indigenous sovereignty and land-based design

-Regenerative and ecological architecture

-Cultural continuity and intergenerational knowledge

-Community-centered and place-based design practices



Our work is guided by:



Purple BluJ Design Principles — relational, human-centered, and justice-driven

Regenerative Design Perspectives — grounded in land, reciprocity, and long-term stewardship

What to Expect



This is not a traditional job application.



It is an invitation to explore:



-Alignment in values and design philosophy

-Collaborative opportunities across communities

-Shared vision for regenerative and culturally rooted design



Opportunities May Include:

-Paid project-based work

-Long-term collaboration

-Participation in an international design network



How to Apply: If you feel aligned with our mission and approach, we invite you to submit your interest and share your work, experience, and perspective in this short assessment link:



???? Assessment Form (English): 

???? Assessment Form (Spanish): 

???? Assessment Form (Portuguese): 



Join us in reimagining design as a practice of restoration, responsibility, and relationship.



Indigenous Just Transition (IJT)

Designing with land. Building with culture. Sustaining for generations.

title: 1.	High-Ticket Sales Closer – Remote & Uncapped Commission
description:
High-Ticket Sales Closer – Remote & Uncapped Commission



	•	Location: Remote

	•	Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

	•	Company: My Home Design (Premium Furniture Brand)

	•	Compensation: 100% Commission-Based (No Base Salary)

	•	Earning Potential: $1,200 – $6,000+ AUD/month (performance-based)



Are You a High-Ticket Sales Closer Ready to Maximise Your Income?



We’re looking for a confident, experienced, and results-driven sales professional who thrives in a pure commission, high-performance environment. If you’re a natural closer, comfortable dealing with high-value clients, and ready to take ownership of your income, this is for you.



This is not a typical sales job – it’s an opportunity to earn significant commissions selling premium furniture to design-conscious clients across Australia.





What You’ll Do

	•	Handle inbound and outbound inquiries (phone,
, social media)

	•	Convert leads into closed sales ($5K–$50K+ AUD per transaction)

	•	Manage the sales pipeline and follow up on quotes, invoices, and payments

	•	Provide a personalised, high-end experience to every client

	•	Maintain clear records and communication using CRM tools



Ideal Candidate

	•	3+ years of experience in high-ticket sales

	•	Excellent negotiation and closing skills

	•	Confident with premium or luxury products

	•	Fluent in English (spoken and written)

	•	Self-motivated, driven, and able to work independently

	•	Comfortable managing high-value clients and long sales cycles





 Commission Structure (AUD)



	•	Sales up to $30,000/month – 3% commission ? Earn up to $900 AUD

	•	Sales between $30,001–$50,000/month – 4% commission ? Earn between $1,200–$2,000 AUD

	•	Sales above $50,000/month – 5% commission ? Earn $2,500+ AUD



No cap on earnings – the more you close, the more you earn.

Performance bonuses available for top performers.



Why Join My Home Design?

	•	Work remotely and independently

	•	Represent a high-quality, design-focused product range

	•	Join a growing business with supportive leadership

	•	Be rewarded based on what you deliver – no micromanagement, just results



To Apply:



Send your CV and a short message about why you’d be a great fit for this role.

Optional: Include a 1–2 minute voice note to showcase your communication style and confidence.

title: Senior Sales Specialist – High-Ticket Sales (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Senior Sales Virtual Specialist – High-Ticket Sales (Remote, Full-Time)



• Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants preferred)

• Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

• Company: My Home Design

• Compensation:

• Base Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD/month

• Commission: 2% on closed sales up to $200K AUD

• Performance Bonuses:

- $200K–$250K AUD: 1.5% commission on extra sales

- $250K–$300K AUD: 2% commission on extra sales

• Total Earning Potential: $3,000 – $5,500 USD/month (including performance bonuses)



Are You a High-Performance Sales Closer Used to Big KPIs?



We are looking for a highly experienced, results-driven Sales Specialist who thrives in high-ticket sales and is used to dealing with large revenue targets and big KPIs. This is not a typical sales role—it requires a seasoned sales professional who can confidently close high-value deals, handle high-net-worth clients, and consistently hit six-figure monthly sales targets. If you are a high achiever who excels in a performance-driven environment, has a strong track record in high-ticket sales, and wants to maximize your earning potential, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Your Role: Full Ownership of High-Ticket Sales



You will be responsible for end-to-end sales management, handling both inbound and outbound sales, nurturing client relationships, and driving revenue.



Lead Generation & Sales Outreach

• Proactively identify and engage high-value customers via calls,
s, and social platforms.

• Convert inbound inquiries into confirmed sales with a strong close rate.

• Develop strategies to increase sales volume and client retention.

• Research and target B2C and B2B clients, including interior designers, developers, and trade partners.



Customer Relationship Management

• Handle high-end clientele, providing a personalized and professional sales experience.

• Build and nurture long-term relationships with high-value customers.

• Understand client needs, offer tailored recommendations, and manage objections effectively.

• Ensure a high-touch customer service approach, providing timely responses and updates.



Order Processing, Customer Queries & Follow-Ups

• Manage the full sales cycle from inquiry to payment.

• Answer questions about customization, pricing, order tracking, and delivery timelines.

• Follow up on pending invoices, quotes, and payments.



Upselling & Cross-Selling

• Identify upselling opportunities to maximize order value.

• Recommend complementary products based on customer needs.



Showroom Sales Support & Appointments

• Encourage showroom visits and assist customers with private appointments.

• Coordinate with the in-store team to ensure a seamless buying experience.



Sales Reporting & KPI Management

• Track sales performance, revenue targets, and conversion rates.

• Provide regular reports on sales progress and identify areas for improvement.



Performance & Sales Expectations

• You are used to working with six-figure monthly sales targets and thrive in a high-performance sales environment.

• You are goal-driven, ambitious, and relentless in closing high-value deals.

• You can manage a strong pipeline of leads, ensuring continuous high sales volume.

• You have experience handling premium products and high-end clients who expect a superior level of service.



Tools You’ll Use

• Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

• CRM & Sales Management Tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar)

• Omnichannel Sales & Communication Platforms

• Shopify & Xero for invoicing and payment tracking

• WhatsApp, SMS, Calls &
 for direct customer engagement



What We’re Looking For

• 5+ years of experience in high-ticket sales, business development, or luxury retail.

• Proven track record of closing high-value deals ($5K–$50K+ per transaction).

• Experience managing six-figure monthly sales targets.

• Expert negotiation and persuasion skills – confident in handling high-value transactions.

• Excellent English communication (written and spoken) – articulate, persuasive, and professional.

• Highly self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently – no micromanagement, just results.

• Customer-centric approach with a passion for delivering exceptional service.

• Strong follow-up and organizational skills – ensuring all customer inquiries are resolved promptly.



Compensation & Commission Structure

• Base Salary: $1,000 – $1,200 USD per month

• Commission: 2% on all closed sales up to $200K AUD

• Performance Bonuses:

	•	$200K–$250K AUD: 1.5% commission on extra sales

	•	$250K–$300K AUD: 2% commission on extra sales

• Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM – 6 PM (AEST)

• No earning limits – the more you sell, the more you earn!



Why Join Us?

• Work with a premium furniture brand that values quality and exceptional design.

• Be part of a fast-growing company with long-term career opportunities.

• Work closely with high-net-worth clients and trade professionals.



How to Apply

If you are an elite sales closer used to handling big KPIs and six-figure revenue targets, we want to hear from you!



To apply, please follow the application process through the job platform where this role is listed.



Optional: Include a 1-2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Content & Creative Marketing Assistant — UK Dental Marketing Agency
description:
ABOUT US



We are a UK-based marketing agency that builds patient acquisition systems for dental practices. We combine SEO, content marketing,
 campaigns, social media management, AI chatbots, and paid advertising to help dental clinics attract and convert new patients.



We currently serve multiple dental clients across London, Surrey, and Cheshire, and are actively growing. We need a skilled content and creative marketing assistant to take ownership of content production, visual content creation, and social media across our client accounts - so our founder can focus on strategy, systems, and business development.



This is a long-term position, not a one-off project. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us.



Schedule: Flexible. We communicate asynchronously. There is a weekly video check-in call, and some overlap with UK business hours (GMT/BST) is preferred but not required.





WHAT YOU WILL DO



Blog Content Management (~25% of your time)

- Manage our blog content pipeline in Airtable - adding approved topics, keywords, and metadata

- Review and edit AI-generated blog drafts for accuracy, readability, and tone (dental/healthcare content - clinical accuracy matters)

- SEO optimise blog posts - meta titles, descriptions, internal linking, image alt text, keyword placement

- Format and publish posts in WordPress

- Source and add relevant royalty-free images



 Marketing (~15% of your time)

- Repurpose blog content into weekly
 campaigns

- Build
 campaigns in Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) - copy, images, formatting, scheduling

- Design
 headers and visual elements

- Review campaign performance and flag issues



Social Media Content and Scheduling (~25% of your time)

- Create social media posts from blog content, clinic photos, and video footage from content days

- Schedule and publish content across Instagram,
, and Google Business Profile

- Maintain a consistent posting cadence across all client accounts

- Write engaging captions and adapt tone per client brand

- Monitor engagement and flag anything notable



Visual Content Creation and Video Editing (~35% of your time)

- Design branded blog featured images and social media templates in Canva

- Edit raw video footage from in-clinic content days into short-form Reels and Stories (CapCut, Premiere Rush, or similar)

- Create treatment infographics, before/after graphics, and quote cards

- Design
 headers and campaign visuals

- Maintain consistent visual branding across each client's platforms

- Create carousel posts and multi-slide educational content





REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE



Content and SEO:

- Strong English writing skills - you will be writing and editing content that UK dental patients will read. Grammar, spelling, and natural tone are critical

- Experience with blog writing, editing, or content management (healthcare or dental experience is a strong plus)

- Working knowledge of on-page SEO - keyword placement, meta tags, internal linking, image optimisation

- WordPress publishing experience (we use WPBakery/Elementor themes - you do not need to build pages, but you need to be comfortable in the editor)

- Comfortable working with Airtable or similar database/spreadsheet tools



Design and Video:

- Strong Canva design skills - you will create branded templates, social graphics, and marketing visuals regularly

- Video editing for short-form content (CapCut, InShot, Premiere Rush, or similar) - we film content days at dental clinics and need footage turned into polished Reels and Stories

- Good visual eye for layout, typography, and brand consistency

- Experience creating carousel posts, infographics, or educational visual content



:

-
 marketing platform experience - ideally Brevo, but Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, or similar is fine



General:

- Reliable internet connection and own laptop/computer

- Comfortable learning new tools and platforms quickly - we will train you on our specific workflows





NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience with dental, medical, or healthcare content

- WordPress page building experience (Elementor, WPBakery) - ability to create and edit pages, not just publish posts

- Landing page design skills - layout, visual hierarchy, calls to action, mobile responsiveness

- Basic HTML/CSS knowledge

- Figma experience for mockups and wireframes

- Technical SEO knowledge (site audits, crawl issues, schema markup)

- Experience with automation tools like n8n, Make, or Zapier

- Link building experience

- CRM management experience





TOOLS YOU WILL USE



- Airtable - content pipeline management

- WordPress (Elementor/WPBakery) - blog publishing

- Brevo -
 campaigns

- Canva - social media design, graphics, templates

- CapCut or similar - short-form video editing

- Google Business Profile - local SEO posting

- Meta Business Suite - social media scheduling



We will train you on our specific workflows and systems. You do not need to know all of these tools on day one, but you should be comfortable learning new platforms quickly.





WHAT WE OFFER



- $700-$1,000/month USD depending on experience (paid via Revolut)

- 13th month bonus in December

- Paid time off after 3-month probation period

- Long-term role with growth potential - as we take on more clients, your role and compensation will grow

- Direct working relationship with the 2 founders - no layers of management

- Opportunity to work across multiple dental brands and expand your portfolio





HOW TO APPLY



Please include ALL of the following in your application. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



1. Include the word DENTAL at the start of your application so we know you read the full posting



2. A brief introduction — who you are, your relevant experience, and why this role interests you (5 sentences max, not a generic cover letter)



3. A link to one blog post or article you have written or edited (any topic - we want to see your writing quality)



4. 2-3 examples of visual content you have created - social media graphics, Canva designs, video edits, or similar. Links to a portfolio, Google Drive folder, or Instagram page you manage are all fine.



5. Your honest answer to this question: What does "on-page SEO" mean to you? Explain it in 2-3 sentences as if you were explaining it to a small business owner.



6. Your expected monthly salary in USD

title: AI Creative Expert - Image & Video
description:
WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

We are seeking an AI Creative Expert with strong visual taste and technical skill to support the visual content production of a startup jewelry and cosmetics brand. 



This role focuses on creating realistic, high-quality images and videos that feel intentional, have personality, and tell a story. The goal is to showcase products in a way that captures attention and makes customers want them. You should have a solid background in graphic design, experience creating brand assets, and hands-on expertise using AI tools for image and video generation.



REQUIREMENTS

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design, digital creatives, or AI visual content creation

- Proven experience creating graphic design, digital creatives, or AI visual content creation 

- Experience with AI tools such as Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, Pika, Adobe Firefly, or similar

- Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, or similar tools

- Ability to translate brand identity into strong, story-driven jewelry and cosmetics visuals

WORK DETAILS

title: Legal Customer Support Specialist
description:
We are a growing Singapore-led legaltech company with a remote team in the Philippines, helping internationally mobile individuals and families prepare estate-planning documents across jurisdictions. We are looking for a Legal Customer Support Specialist to join our team and help deliver a smooth, responsive customer experience.



This is a full-time remote role for someone with strong written English, good judgment, strong attention to detail, and availability to start immediately.



What you’ll do



You will help manage customer communication across our support channels and act as the first point of contact for many customer questions.



Your work will include responding to customer enquiries, helping customers understand next steps in the process, following up on missing information, handling status questions, assisting with account or payment-related issues, and escalating more complex matters when needed.



You will work alongside our existing Intercom and AI-assisted support setup, handling the conversations and issues that require human judgment, care, and follow-through.



You will also help maintain clear internal records, use templates and macros effectively, and contribute to improving support workflows, help content, and escalation processes over time.



You should be comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment where SOPs, internal systems, Intercom, and AI tools are part of day-to-day work.



The initial focus of the role will be on UAE-related customer support, with scope to support additional markets over time.



We are looking for someone who:

- writes clearly, professionally, and empathetically in English

- has strong attention to detail

- is comfortable handling customer communication in a calm and structured way

- can follow SOPs and structured processes reliably

- is comfortable using Intercom, templates, macros, and AI tools as part of day-to-day work

- is comfortable reviewing AI-assisted responses and stepping in when human judgment is needed

- is comfortable escalating legal or operational issues appropriately

- can work hours with meaningful overlap with Gulf business hours

- is available to start immediately



Experience in legal customer support is strongly preferred.



Working arrangement



- Full time

- Fully remote

- Working hours should overlap meaningfully with Gulf business hours

- Immediate start preferred



Compensation



USD 900 to 1,200 per month, depending on experience and fit.



There is also a monthly performance bonus tied to response quality, turnaround time, and customer satisfaction.

Application process



To apply, please send your CV and answer the short questions below.

- Why you think you would be a good fit for this role

- Your availability and earliest possible start date

- Start the first line of your application with: April 



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to an interview. Candidates may also be asked to complete a paid work sample involving review of sample customer messages, drafting of responses using SOPs and templates, and identifying which issues should be escalated.

title: Artist Manager / Expert Video Editor
description:
Overview



We are seeking a high-level operator who combines elite video editing skills with hands-on artist management and social media execution.



This role is not for beginners or intermediates. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of content, think strategically, and execute at a professional level with minimal direction.



You will be responsible for turning raw footage into high-performing content, managing social platforms, and actively contributing to the growth of an artist’s brand and audience.



This role directly supports campaigns that drive real fan engagement, growth, and long-term 
ntum for artists



Core Responsibilities

1. Video Editing and Content Creation

-Transform raw footage into engaging, high-retention, platform-native content

-Edit for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and long-form YouTube

-Apply advanced color grading to unprocessed 4K footage

-Create strong hooks, pacing, and storytelling structure

-Add high-quality captions, motion graphics, and visual elements

-Deliver content optimized for both organic growth and paid advertising



2. Social Media Management

-Manage daily posting across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and

-Maintain consistent posting cadence using provided or self-generated content

-Respond to comments and messages in the artist’s voice (after training)

-Increase engagement through authentic interaction and trend awareness

-Track performance and adjust content strategy accordingly



3. Advertising Creative Development

-Develop high-performing ad creatives for monthly music campaigns

-Create multiple variations of content with minimal direction

-Understand what converts in paid media environments

-Align visuals and messaging with audience targeting and platform behavior



4. Artist Management and Growth Execution

Conduct ongoing research for:

-Venues and booking opportunities

-Blog placements and media coverage

-Growth opportunities within the music space

-Perform outreach via
 on behalf of the artist

-Identify and act on opportunities to increase visibility and traction

-Stay actively engaged in the music ecosystem, especially faith-based music



5. Reporting and Communication

-Provide weekly performance updates

-Track content output, engagement metrics, and growth indicators

-Maintain organized systems for content, outreach, and reporting

-Communicate clearly and professionally in English



Requirements



Skill Level

-Expert-level video editing only

-Strong portfolio required demonstrating viral or high-performing content

-Deep understanding of short-form content dynamics and audience retention



Technical Requirements



Applicants must provide the following:



-Internet speed (upload and download)

-Computer specifications (CPU, GPU, RAM)

-Editing software used and level of expertise (e.g. Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve)

-Any social media management or scheduling tools used



Core Competencies



-Advanced color grading and visual finishing

-High-level captioning and pacing for short-form content

-Strong creative instinct for viral content

-Deep understanding of music marketing and social trends

-Ability to operate with minimal direction

-Strong organizational discipline



Platform and Industry Alignment



-Active awareness of trends across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

-Strong familiarity with the music space, especially faith-based artists

-Understanding of how content drives fan growth and engagement

-Ability to align content with long-term artist development, not just short-term spikes



Tools and Access



-Must be comfortable managing multiple social media accounts

-Will be given access to
 and platforms for outreach and posting

-Bonus if experienced with cross-platform publishing tools



Hiring Process



-Applications will be reviewed and filtered based on quality and experience

-Selected candidates will receive raw footage for a test edit

-Test edits may include watermarks and are used strictly to evaluate skill level



What We Are Looking For



-Someone who can think, not just execute

-Someone who understands both content and growth strategy

-Someone who can operate at a high level without constant oversight

-Someone who treats this like ownership, not a task list

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Aqua Home Supply

We are a fast-growing ecommerce business specializing in water treatment products. We process hundreds of orders a month and pride ourselves on taking care of our customers. We're a small, tight-knit team and we operate with high standards, clear communication, and a lot of trust.



We're growing and we need someone who can be the voice of our brand — someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and genuinely cares about getting customers the right outcome.



The Role

You will be our dedicated Customer Service Rep, handling all inbound and outbound customer communication. This is a high-ownership role — you are not just answering tickets, you are managing the full customer experience from first contact through final resolution.



You will work closely with our Operations Supervisor, who handles the vendor and fulfillment side of the business. Your job is to own the customer relationship at every step.



What You'll Do

Handle 10–20 inbound and outbound calls per day

Manage a full ticket queue — tracking updates, damaged goods, missing parts, returns, cancellations, and sales inquiries

Send acknowledgments to every customer within 2 business hours — no exceptions

Collect order details, photos, and relevant information before escalating to the Supervisor

Keep customers updated throughout the resolution process — never leave someone waiting more than 1 business day without an update

Answer technical questions using an approved FAQ/script; send Calendly bookings for anything beyond the script

Report ticket backlog and open issues to the Supervisor in a daily check-in

Work within a clear escalation framework — you'll know exactly what to handle and what to pass up



Who We're Looking For



Must have:

Excellent spoken and written English — you'll be on calls with US customers daily

Experience with helpdesk or ticketing software (Freshdesk, Zendesk, Gorgias, or similar)

Comfortable on the phone — this is not a chat-only role

Available during US business hours Monday through Friday

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow a clear process

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace for calls



Nice to have:

Prior experience in ecommerce customer service

Experience with order management or fulfillment workflows

Familiarity with carrier tracking (FedEx, UPS, USPS) with freight carriers being a bonus



What Makes This a Great Opportunity

Clear processes from day one — you'll have a full playbook covering every ticket type

Real ownership — you're not just following scripts, you're managing customer relationships

Supportive team — you'll have an experienced Operations Supervisor to escalate to and learn from

Performance-based raise at 90 days for candidates who hit their targets

Stable, growing company with long-term potential for the right person



How to Apply



Subject line must start with: AQUA CS — applications without this will not be reviewed



Then include all of the following:



Your resume or work history

A short voice or video recording (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your customer service experience — this is required and helps us assess communication skills

The name of the ticketing software you have used and how long you used it

Your available hours in US Eastern or Central time

Confirm in your message that you are available to start immediately

title: Acquisition Manager – Remote ($5hr, Upto $800 base pay, $20 bonues, plus commission)
description:
Schedule (Starting)

• Wednesdays and Thursdays

• 2 hours per day (4 hours/week)

• Calling US sellers (must be comfortable speaking on the phone)



-



Performance-Based Hours Increases (Automatic)



Hours can increase automatically based on results:

• Step 1 – Increase to 10 hours/week:

If you secure 2 executed purchase contracts at/below MAO within any rolling 30-day period, your schedule will automatically increase to 10 hours per week (as long as lead volume supports it).

• Step 2 – Increase to 40 hours/week (Full-Time):

If you secure 3 executed purchase contracts within any rolling 30-day period, your schedule will automatically increase to 40 hours per week, based on performance and lead volume.



Notes:

• “At/below MAO” means the final signed purchase price is at or below the MAO calculated using our comp/underwriting guidelines.

• Hours increases depend on consistent performance, communication, and available lead flow.



-



Pay

• $5/hour base

• $20 per signed contract

• Commission: 6% of the assignment fee (paid on closed/collected deals)



-



Job Overview



We are hiring a closing-focused Acquisition Manager to call motivated seller leads, run comps, present offers, negotiate, and get purchase contracts signed for our real estate wholesaling business.



-



What You Will Do

• Call warm/hot seller leads and follow up consistently

• Qualify sellers: motivation, timeline, condition, price

• Run property comps (market value) to support offer pricing

• Present offers clearly and professionally

• Negotiate and handle objections

• Get purchase contracts signed (DocuSign or similar)

• Update notes and lead statuses in our tracking system

• Coordinate handoff after signing (next steps with the team)



-



Required Skills

• Strong English (spoken + written)

• Confident on the phone (sales/closing experience)

• Must know how to comp properties (sold comps, adjust for beds/baths/sqft, condition, days on market)

• Able to use tools like Redfin/Zillow/Realtor (PropStream or similar is a plus)

• Reliable and consistent every Wed/Thu

• Organized follow-ups and clean notes

• Stable internet, headset, quiet workspace



-



Preferred (Nice to Have)

• Real estate wholesaling acquisitions experience

• Experience calling US-based sellers



-



How to Apply (Required)



Send your application by
 to: Vladimir Ignacio (Operations Manager)





Include ALL of the following:

1. Your experience (2–5 sentences)

2. Your time zone + confirmation you can work Wed/Thu consistently

3. Your equipment (internet speed + headset)

4. Voice sample link (preferred)

5. Comp Test (Required):

Comp this property: 15812 Starlite St, Clermont, FL 34714

Include:



• Your step-by-step comp process (5–8 bullets)

• At least 3 SOLD comps (0.5–1 mile if possible, similar beds/baths/sqft, sold within 6–12 months)

• For each comp: address, sold price, sold date, beds/baths, sqft, link/source

• Your final value range + best number, and 2–5 sentences why



6. Objection question: How do you respond when a seller says “Your offer is too low”?



Applications missing any required items will not be considered.
