title: Legal Operations Specialist
description:
We are a growing Singapore-led legaltech company with a remote team in the Philippines, helping internationally mobile individuals and families prepare estate-planning documents across jurisdictions. We are looking for a Legal Operations Specialist to join our operations team and help deliver a smooth customer experience.



This is a full-time remote role for someone with strong attention to detail, ideally with an attorney, law degree, paralegal, court, or compliance-related background, and availability to start immediately.



What you’ll do



You will help manage customer cases from draft to completion as part of our operations team.



Your work will include reviewing customer information and legal documents against internal checklists and SOPs, identifying missing or inconsistent information, coordinating revisions and translations, following up on outstanding items, and helping prepare files for court submission.



You will also help guide clients through submission-related steps, keep internal records accurate, and escalate issues when needed.



You should be comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment where SOPs, internal systems, and AI tools are part of day-to-day work.



The initial focus of the role will be on UAE-related cases, with scope to support additional markets over time.



An attorney background, legal training, or law degree is strongly preferred, but not strictly required.



We are looking for someone who:



- writes clearly and professionally in English

- has very strong attention to detail

- is comfortable reviewing formal documents

- can follow SOPs and structured processes reliably

- is comfortable using AI tools as part of day-to-day work

- is comfortable communicating with clients

- can work hours with meaningful overlap with Gulf business hours

- is available to start immediately



Working arrangement



- Full time

- Fully remote

- Working hours should overlap meaningfully with Gulf business hours

- Immediate start preferred



Compensation



USD 1,400 to 1,600 per month, depending on experience and fit.



There is also a monthly performance bonus tied to quality, turnaround time, and customer satisfaction.



Application process



To apply, please send your CV and answer the short questions below.



- Why you think you would be a good fit for this role

- Your availability and earliest possible start date

- Start the first line of your application with: April



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to an interview. Candidates may also be asked to complete a paid work sample involving review of a sample case, identification of issues, and drafting of a short customer message based on provided SOPs and templates.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.

).

/hea-ph-team

At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.

WHY HIEND ACCENTS?



At HiEnd Accents, we are a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, a growth mindset, and a commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights. Recognition on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the US reflects our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. Mission: To keep our eCommerce engine running smoothly by coordinating product launches, uploads, and site content with high precision and strong follow-through—so our storefronts stay accurate, on-brand, and on schedule.



Key Outcomes



- Monitor and manage all eCommerce-related tasks end-to-end, ensuring timely follow-up with the team and leadership until completion

- Actively monitor eCommerce-related questions or issues raised via Slack or
; create tasks/tickets as needed and drive them to resolution

- Maintain and monitor Airtable to ensure product upload statuses are accurate, deadlines are visible, and projects stay on schedule

- Oversee the product upload process across platforms, ensuring each product has complete and correct copy, imagery, and required assets before publishing

- Identify gaps proactively (missing copy, missing images, incomplete data, unclear approvals), coordinate ownership, and resolve blockers before launch dates are impacted

- Ensure accurate and timely image and copy uploads across all eCommerce platforms, including QA for formatting, spelling, links, and brand consistency

- Coordinate the copywriting workflow (draft ? review ? approval), ensuring product copy is completed and approved ahead of deadlines

- Coordinate promotions, banners, and on-site content updates, ensuring assets are briefed, created, approved, and ready in advance of launch

- Support the eCommerce team with miscellaneous operational and administrative tasks as needed, especially during heavy launch periods

- Work independently with a high level of productivity, efficiency, and attention to detail, escalating risks early and proposing solutions



Other Regular Responsibilities

- Utilize data and research to evaluate campaign performance, identifying key insights and providing actionable recommendations

- Maintain a well-organized and up-to-date repository of marketing assets (both internal as well as from competitors), such as graphics, promotional materials, and social media posts, ensuring easy access for the marketing team

- Assist the Marketing Director with various marketing-related tasks as needed



Who You Are

- 1–3 years of experience in eCommerce operations, digital operations, marketing operations, or a project coordination role (consumer products preferred)

- Highly organized with strong follow-through—you close loops and keep work moving

- Excellent attention to detail; you catch errors before they become customer-facing

- Strong written communication skills and comfort coordinating across multiple stakeholders

- Proficient with Airtable (or similar tools), Slack, and cloud-based docs; able to learn new platforms quickly

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced environment

- Proactive, resourceful, and solutions-oriented; you don’t wait to be told what to do

- Alignment with the company's mission and values, which can be found here: 
/3Unr0ub.



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?

At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



- **Competitive Compensation -** We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- **Professional Growth -** We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow and develop their careers

- **Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals -** We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Data Entry Specialist
description:
$350 USD per month - 20 hours per week.



We're seeking a highly accurate and fast-paced Data Verification Specialist for a full-time remote role. This position involves reviewing AI-generated transcriptions of historical handwritten documents and correcting errors. The workflow requires maintaining a target output of verifying 800 names per hour using a streamlined, keyboard-driven interface. 



Compensation:

$700 USD (30 Day Contract - includes $200 performance bonus)



About Us:

We are a remote-first technology startup building the largest verified digital archive of Mediterranean genealogical records. By combining proprietary Artificial Intelligence with human verification, we solve the transcription errors that currently plague legacy family history platforms. Our database maps millions of historical births, marriages, and household census records from the 1500s to the 1900s, providing a definitive, 100?curate index for a global diaspora.



Culture:

As a start-up, there's always lots to learn. It's not a top-down culture, we reward performance and focus on what's been achieved, not what's been missed.



The Role:

As a Data Verification Specialist, you provide the final quality control check before records are published to a live database.

1. Core Task: Visually cross-reference scanned images of 18th and 19th-century handwritten documents against text generated by our AI.

2. Correction: Quickly approve accurate matches and manually correct the 5% to 10% of names where the AI hallucinates or misinterprets the handwriting.

3. Speed & Efficiency: Maintain a baseline verification speed of 800 names per hour utilizing custom keyboard shortcuts to eliminate mouse dependency.

4. Linguistic Context: The records feature Mediterranean naming conventions (closely resembling Spanish, Italian, and Latin roots). You must adapt quickly to specific character combinations and cursive handwriting styles.



Requirements

- Demonstrated experience in high-volume data entry, transcription, or quality assurance.

- Exceptional visual attention to detail and the ability to sustain focus over long processing sessions.

- High proficiency in reading cursive handwriting and identifying phonetic spelling patterns.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a workstation optimized for fast, repetitive keyboard input.



Who this role is good for:

- You thrive in "flow state" environments and prefer highly repetitive, singular workflows over constantly shifting daily responsibilities.

- You have a proven background in medical transcription, legal data entry, or similar roles that demand sustained focus and accuracy over a full shift.

- You instinctively use keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys. You view using a computer mouse as a bottleneck to your processing speed.

- You don't get stuck on puzzles. If an 18th-century word is completely illegible, you are comfortable flagging it within 5 seconds and immediately moving to the next record.



BONUS: You have a natural knack for deciphering "doctor's handwriting" or historical cursive, allowing you to instantly recognize visual patterns in messy scripts rather than trying to read them letter-by-letter.



**********

To Apply:



Please spend 5 minutes filling out this form: 



NOTE: This is currently a 1 month contract, depending on performance, this will lead to a part-time role, and later a full-time, permanent contract when we officially launch.

title: Full-Time YouTube Editor + Shorts Specialist + Growth Strategist
description:
We’re a fast-growing real estate media brand creating YouTube and short-form content focused on helping people make smarter real estate decisions.



We’re looking for a full-time YouTube expert who can:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos

 • Create high-performing short-form content

 • Support scripting and content ideas

 • Help grow the channel



This is not just an editing job.

We want someone who understands how YouTube works and how to make content perform.



What You’ll Be Doing



YouTube Long-Form Editing

 • Edit 10–20 minute videos with strong pacing and storytelling

 • Add b-roll, graphics, captions, and sound design

 • Improve flow and retention (not just visuals)



Short-Form Content (Custom Content)

 • Edit short videos (usually under 2 minutes) from raw footage

 • Add captions, b-roll, and visual elements

 • Focus on strong hooks and keeping attention

 • Create content for Shorts, Reels, and TikTok



YouTube Growth & Strategy

 • Help come up with video ideas that will perform

 • Assist with titles, hooks, and overall structure

 • Understand retention, CTR, and watch time

 • Bring ideas to improve channel performance



Script & Content Support

 • Help improve scripts, hooks, and video structure

 • Contribute ideas for both long-form and short-form content



Team Support

 • Help edit videos for agents on our team

 • Maintain consistent quality across content

 • Be reliable with communication and deadlines



Who This Is For



You:

 • Have experience editing YouTube videos and short-form content

 • Understand what makes videos perform, not just look good

 • Know how to improve retention, watch time, and engagement

 • Can contribute ideas, not just follow instructions

 • Are reliable, detail-oriented, and consistent



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio (YouTube + Shorts/Reels/TikTok)

 • Experience working with creators, brands, or channels

 • Understanding of YouTube strategy and content structure

 • Full-time availability and reliable internet



???? How To Apply (REQUIRED)



If you do not follow these steps, your application will not be considered.



1. Portfolio



Send:

 • 2–3 YouTube videos you edited

 • 3–5 short-form videos you edited

 • Links to channels or brands you’ve worked with

 • Brief explanation of your role



2. Background



Answer these questions:

 • What YouTube channels or creators have you worked with?

 • Have you helped grow a channel? If yes, how?

 • What do you think makes a video perform well on YouTube?



3. Test Project (Important)



Selected applicants will be given:

 • A 5-minute YouTube clip

 • A short-form raw video (under 2 minutes)



You will edit both.



We will evaluate:

 • Hook and pacing

 • Storytelling and structure

 • Retention editing

 • Use of b-roll and captions

 • Overall editing decisions



This is the most important step.



Compensation

 • Full-time role

 • Pay based on experience

 • Long-term opportunity



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow quickly.



As we expand, you may:

 • Support multiple real estate agents and teams

 • Take on a lead editor role

 • Help manage content across multiple channels

 • Play a bigger role in strategy and growth



Final Note



We are not looking for a basic editor.



We are looking for someone who understands:

 • YouTube

 • Content

 • Attention



If that’s you, apply and show us your work.

title: Amazon Product Research VA (AU Marketplace - Online Arbitrage & Wholesale)
description:
I’m looking for an experienced Amazon Product Research VA to help find high-quality, low-risk, and profitable products for the Australian (AU) marketplace.

I’ve worked with VAs before, but the main issue was low-quality leads, incorrect calculations, and lack of proper validation, so this time I’m only looking for someone who understands how to find accurate, scalable, and well-researched opportunities — not random deals.



???? What I’m Looking For:

- Experience in Online Arbitrage and/or Wholesale sourcing

- Ability to find high-quality leads only (not quantity-based)

- Strong understanding of:

  - ROI (minimum 25–30?ter fees)

  - Net profit (minimum $5+ per unit)

  - Demand validation (BSR, review velocity, seller count)

  - Competition analysis (Buy Box, seller rotation, price stability)



???????? IMPORTANT (AU MARKET):

I am based in Australia, so:

- Tools like Keepa and SellerAmp are Restricted in AU

- You must be comfortable with:

  - Manual sourcing

  - Accurate validation without over-reliance on tools

- Prefer sourcing from Australian suppliers where possible (faster delivery, fewer issues)



???? PRODUCT STRATEGY:

- Focus on low-risk, consistent products

- Avoid unstable listings or heavy price fluctuations

- Prefer listings with stable Buy Box and manageable competition



???? GATED vs UNGATED:

- Ungated products are preferred for simplicity and speed

- However, I am also open to gated products if:

  - The supplier is legitimate (wholesale / distributor)

  - Can provide a valid invoice acceptable by Amazon

  - Pricing and margins are still strong after all costs



???? I am NOT interested in:

- Cheap or unreliable suppliers

- Retail-only sources for ungating (e.g. Kmart, Target, iHerb, etc.)



???? Avoid:

- Supplements, skincare, and restricted categories (unless properly validated)

- Fake ROI or incorrect calculations

- Unverified suppliers



? Bonus (Preferred):

- Ability to find reliable wholesale suppliers

- Experience with ungating process

- Strong understanding of low-risk sourcing strategies



???? Trial Task:

We will start with a small paid trial:

- Provide 3–5 high-quality leads

- Must include full validation 

(* Amazon product link

* Supplier link (where to buy)

* Cost price

* Selling price

* Estimated profit after all fees

* Number of sellers

* How much Sales it has past month

* BSR

* Product must have decent reviews on Amazon)

- I will review accuracy and quality



If results are strong ? we move to long-term work



???? Pay:

- Starting: $2.5/hour (or per lead depending on performance)

- Opportunity to scale into consistent long-term / full-time role



Please include:

1. Your past experience (responsibilities and results)

2. Why your previous role ended

3. Example of a product you sourced (with ROI breakdown)

4. Your step-by-step sourcing process (especially for AU)

5. How you ensure products are low-risk and properly validated

6. Your experience with supplier sourcing



I’m looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and focused on quality over quantity for a long-term working relationship.

If you understand the AU market and can consistently deliver strong results, this will become an ongoing role.

Thanks.

title: Video Editor
description:
About The Role



Nolan Interior is a bootstrapped DTC brand that has generated over $70M in revenue since 2022 selling sofa covers and pet-friendly home goods to US customers. We run a high-velocity, data-driven creative system where editing work directly impacts our ability to scale ad spend profitably.



As our Video Editor, you’ll be embedded in the creative engine that fuels our growth. You’ll work alongside our creative strategists and media buyers to produce 15–25 direct-response ads per week across formats: AI avatars, UGC, b-roll + voiceover, testimonials, and more. Every ad you edit gets tested against real performance data. If it doesn’t perform, it dies. If it wins, it scales to six figures in spend. Your job is to make winners.



This isn’t brand work. This isn’t YouTube content. This is performance creative—where your editorial choices around pacing, hooks, cuts, and transitions directly impact CTR, watch time, and ROAS. You’ll have direct access to performance data so you always know what’s scaling and what’s not.



TL;DR — We’ll Know You’re the One If…



You eat, sleep, and breathe direct-response ads. You can watch a winning ad and reverse-engineer exactly why it worked—the hook, the pacing, the cut timing, the CTA placement. You’re fast, hungry, and obsessed with output. You don’t chase perfection—you chase performance. You’d rather ship 15 ads that test well than spend a week polishing one “beautiful” piece that nobody clicks on.



What You’ll Do



High-Volume Ad Production

- Edit 15–25 direct-response ads weekly across formats: AI avatars, UGC, b-roll + voiceover, testimonials

- Work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our strategists to execute concepts rapidly

- Maintain a constant pipeline of fresh creatives to prevent ad fatigue and sustain performance



Performance-Driven Editing

- Edit specifically to amplify the message and drive conversions—not to create “beautiful” content

- Understand that your editorial choices (pacing, cuts, hooks, transitions) directly impact CTR, watch time, and ROAS

- Iterate rapidly on winning concepts, testing variations to validate and scale performance



Tools & Research

- Use the best tools in the industry: ElevenLabs, Higgsfield, HeyGen, VEO, Nano Banana, and more

- Research winning ads across the market so you have a visual library of what’s performing right now

- Stay sharp on emerging formats, AI tools, and editing techniques that give us an edge



Collaboration & Iteration

- Work closely with the creative strategist and CMO daily to receive feedback and stay updated on learnings (winners and losers)

- Implement feedback quickly—often same-day—to capitalize on winning angles before they fatigue

- Analyze winning vs. losing ads to refine your editorial instincts and improve hit rate



Process & Systems

- Follow and help refine SOPs for repeatable editing workflows

- Document your editorial decisions and learnings to contribute to the team’s knowledge base

- Maintain organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration



?? You’ll Love This Role If…



- You’re obsessed with performance marketing and can’t stop analyzing why certain ads work

- You thrive on speed and volume—shipping 15+ creatives a week excites you, not overwhelms you

- You want direct access to performance data so you can see exactly how your work impacts revenue

- You love working with AI tools and staying ahead of the curve on new editing tech

- You want to be part of a lean, high-performance team where your work actually matters

- You get fired up by creative briefs and feedback loops, not working in isolation



???? You’ll Hate This Role If…



- You care more about making things look “cinematic” than making things convert

- You need weeks to deliver a single polished piece—our pace won’t work for you

- You take feedback personally or need to be eased into critique

- You want to work on brand films, documentaries, or long-form content

- You don’t like structure—we run on SOPs, briefs, and data-driven decisions

- You’re looking for a chill, low-output role



About You

- 1+ year editing direct-response ads for e-commerce or DTC brands (social media ads specifically—not brand videos or YouTube content)

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut—you should be fast and fluent in both

- Output-focused mindset—you understand that 10 ads at 80% quality beat 2 ads at 100% quality

- Pattern recognition—you can watch winning ads and reverse-engineer what editorial choices made them perform

- Data literacy—you understand CTR, watch time, hook rate, and how your edits impact these metrics

- Self-starter—you don’t need hand-holding or micromanagement to ship quality work on deadline

- Coachable—you take feedback without ego and implement it immediately

- Excellent English—clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration

- Hungry—you’re prepared to go hard, lock in, and put high intent into everything you do



Nice-to-Have (But Not Required)

- Completed the Ecom Talent editing course

- Experience working with DTC brands doing $10M+ in annual revenue

- Familiarity with AI-powered creative tools (ElevenLabs, HeyGen, Higgsfield, VEO, etc.)

- Experience editing for TikTok Shop or live shopping formats

- Understanding of Meta Ads Manager and basic media buying concepts



What Success Looks Like in This Role



30 Days

- Fully onboarded into our creative workflow, tools, SOPs, and file systems

- Reviewed our top-performing ads and understand what makes them win

- Delivering 10–15 edited ads per week at quality standard with minimal revisions

- Built rapport with the creative strategist and CMO through daily communication



60 Days

- Consistently delivering 15–25 ads per week at 95%+ on-time completion

- Demonstrating clear pattern recognition—your edits reflect an understanding of what performs

- Proactively suggesting iterations on winning concepts without being asked

- Contributing to a 10%+ creative hit rate (ads that validate and scale)



90 Days

- You’re a core part of the creative engine—strategists trust your instincts and execution

- Your edits consistently contribute to ads achieving 3%+ CTR and strong ROAS

- You’ve helped refine at least one SOP or workflow that improved team efficiency

- You’re actively researching and bringing new ad formats, tools, or techniques to the team



Position Details

- Full-time position

- Competitive salary based on experience

title: Dispatcher Operations Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities



1. Fleet & Retail Ops Coordination

*Follow up for approval

*Ensure parts are sourced

*Finalize tech routes for the following day

*Track all jobs in progress and flag issues proactively

*Communicate clearly with customers and fleet managers about job timing, status, and follow-ups

*Submit and close out fleet approvals in Element, LeasePlan, and AutoIntegrate

*Ensure invoices match approvals; follow up on outstanding invoices and missing payments

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Closer – US Business Leads (High Commission)
description:

Our company builds professional websites for businesses such as assisted living facilities. We generate the leads and create a demo website preview for each prospect. Your role is to call the business owner, introduce the preview website, and close the sale.

title: Full-Stack Developer (Dashboard & Data Systems)
description:
Contract Full-Stack Developer (Dashboard & Data Systems)

Location: Remote

Job Type: Contract / Freelance

Company: Grill Rescue



About the Role

Grill Rescue is seeking a contract Full-Stack Developer to help complete and enhance an internal analytics platform, the Grill Rescue Operations Dashboard (G.R.O.D.). This tool is designed to centralize data across multiple platforms (Shopify, Amazon, advertising channels, and internal systems) into a single dashboard used for operations, marketing, and inventory planning. The current application has been partially developed using modern web technologies and AI-assisted workflows. We are looking for someone who can step in, evaluate the existing system, and lead the completion and optimization of the platform.



Key Responsibilities

System Evaluation & Analysis

Review and understand the current codebase and architecture

Analyze data flow between platforms (Shopify, Amazon, ad platforms, etc.)

Identify gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement

Provide a clear assessment of what should be maintained, improved, or rebuilt



Roadmap Development

Create a structured development plan with defined milestones

Prioritize feature completion and system improvements

Establish timelines and checkpoints for progress

Recommend best practices for scalability and maintainability



Data Integration

Consolidate data from Shopify, Amazon, advertising platforms, and internal systems

Implement automation where possible

Support manual CSV import/export where automation is not feasible



Dashboard & Analytics

Revenue tracking (daily, weekly, monthly)

Channel breakdown (Amazon vs Shopify)

ROAS, MER, TACoS

Net profit and contribution margin by SKU

Inventory tracking and days on hand

Reorder alerts and performance indicators

Customer metrics (AOV, conversion rate, repeat purchase rate)



Forecasting & Planning Tools

SKU-level sales forecasting

Stockout prediction and reorder recommendations

Inventory risk analysis (excess vs shortage)

Seasonal trend analysis

Year-over-year performance comparison

Adjustable projections based on ad spend, promotions, and inventory levels



Operational Features

User accounts with role-based permissions

Report generation and export functionality

Mobile-responsive and desktop-optimized UI

Integration of an AI-powered interface for querying and interacting with data



Applicant Qualifications

Required Qualifications

Experience in full-stack web development

Proficiency with modern frontend frameworks (React preferred)

Experience with TypeScript and JavaScript

Familiarity with relational databases (PostgreSQL or similar)

Experience integrating third-party APIs and data sources

Ability to understand and work within an existing codebase

Strong problem-solving and system design skills



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with Supabase or similar backend platforms

Familiarity with eCommerce systems (Shopify, Amazon)

Experience building dashboards or analytics tools

Experience with automation tools (e.g., n8n, Zapier)

Understanding of marketing and financial metrics (ROAS, MER, TACoS, etc.)



What We’re Looking For

Someone comfortable working with partially completed systems

Ability to operate independently and make informed technical decisions

Strong communication and documentation skills

A practical, solution-oriented approach to development



Deliverables

System audit and technical assessment

Development roadmap with milestones

Completed and functional dashboard

Clean, maintainable, and documented codebase

Deployment-ready application



Additional Details

NDA and service agreement required

Flexible schedule, milestone-based expectations

Remote position



How to Apply

Please include:

Examples of relevant projects (especially dashboards or data systems)

A brief description of your experience with similar work

Your preferred tech stack

Your availability and estimated timeline for a project of this scope

A short outline of how you would approach evaluating and completing this project



Please include your favorite food in the subject line of your
 when applying. Applications without this will not be considered.



Applicants who include a thoughtful approach to the project will be prioritized.

title: Experienced Australian Mortgage Loan Processing Manager (WFH)
description:
URGENT HIRING: AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager (WFH)

IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING



To ensure your application is reviewed, please follow ALL instructions below.



Step 1

 your CV and a short cover letter to:







Step 2

Complete the application form:




Step 3

Take the DISC personality test:


/disc-personality-test

.



Applications sent via OLJ message or admin
 without completing these steps will not be reviewed.



Shortlisted applicants will be invited for a final interview with our Director, Lalen.



About Premium Select Finance



Premium Select Finance is a multi-award-winning Australian mortgage brokerage known for delivering exceptional service and reliable lending solutions to clients across Australia.



We are expanding our team and looking for a highly capable Mortgage Loan Processing Manager who can confidently manage the end-to-end loan process from submission through settlement and post-settlement support.



If you enjoy working in a structured, fast-paced environment and want a stable long-term role with an international team, this opportunity may be a great fit.



Role Details



Position: AU Mortgage Loan Processing Manager

Employment: Full-Time | Work From Home

Location: Metro Manila preferred but not required

Salary: TBD (based on experience)

Start Date: Immediate



Work Schedule



Monday – Friday

6:00 AM – 3:00 PM Manila Time



During Australian Daylight Saving Time (DST):

7:00 AM – 4:00 PM Manila Time



Key Responsibilities



You will manage the full loan processing lifecycle, including:



• Processing Australian home loan applications from submission to settlement

• Managing applications through CRM systems (Infynity preferred), Quickli, AOL, and lender portals

• Coordinating with clients, brokers, lenders, solicitors, and valuers

• Calling clients to follow up required documents or provide loan updates

• Contacting lenders or solicitors to progress applications

• Managing lender forms, supporting documents, and compliance checklists

• Maintaining accurate file notes and updates in the CRM

• Ensuring files meet Australian mortgage compliance standards (NCCP, ASIC, Privacy Act)



Requirements



To succeed in this role, you should have:



• 3–5 years experience processing Australian mortgage loans (broker-side preferred)

• Experience using CRM systems (any CRM) — Infynity experience is a strong advantage

• Familiarity with Quickli, AOL, and lender portals

• Knowledge of refinance processes, discharges, FHOG, top-ups, and investor loans

• Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Confidence making phone calls to clients, lenders, and solicitors

• Strong attention to detail and organisation

• Ability to manage multiple files and deadlines

• A reliable home office setup and stable internet



Applicants with experience working with Australian brokerages or aggregators (e.g. Aussie, Loan Market, Mortgage Choice, Connective, AFG, Finsure) will be highly regarded.



Preferred but not required



• Metro Manila based

• Experience handling complex loan scenarios (SMSF, trusts, investors)



Why Join Premium Select Finance



We are looking for someone who wants more than just a job — someone who wants a stable long-term role with opportunities to grow.



You will benefit from:



• Stable long-term work-from-home opportunity with an Australian brokerage

• Working with a supportive offshore team and experienced brokers

• Structured systems and processes to support your success

• Opportunity for career growth and leadership roles

• Australian public holidays observed (paid)

• Ongoing training and professional development



Contact



Premium Select Finance









LinkedIn: Premium Select Finance



If you have strong AU mortgage processing experience and are looking for a stable long-term opportunity with a professional Australian brokerage, we look forward to receiving your application.

title: Real Estate Media QA/QC & Delivery Specialist
description:
I am a solo real estate media owner and operator starting to expand my business from myself to other photographers and support staff. I am looking for a highly detail-oriented Quality Assurance (QA) and Delivery Specialist. You will be the final "set of eyes" before our clients receive their photos.



The Workflow: 

1.) I will upload RAW HDR brackets from the field throughout the day (CST). You will be responsible for:

Downloading from AutoHDR. 

2.) Performing final QA/QC and "Flavor" edits in Adobe Lightroom (Verticals, White Balance, Sky Replacements, cleaning up clutter like wires or extra boxes in a garage.)

3.)Using AI platforms like Nano Banana Pro to prompt the AI to virtually stage, sky replace, etc. 

4.)Final Export and Delivery to clients via the Spiro platform.



The Shift: This is a fixed shift starting at 3:00 PM CST (5:00 AM PHT). This is an early morning shift for you, allowing for real-time collaboration with me while I am in the field.



The goal is to transition myself away from delivering photos to clients late at night to actual same day delivery. This will free up more time for me to focus on sales or more photos shoots. 



Requirements:

Must have a high-speed internet connection (50Mbps+).

High proficiency in Adobe Lightroom (Classic/CC).

Experience with Spiro or similar Real Estate delivery platforms is a massive plus.

Extreme attention to detail—you hate crooked lines and "blown-out" windows.

Ability to work independently and meet 2-hour turnaround times for live uploads.

title: React Native Mobile App Developer  (Long-Term)
description:
Wage: $10/hr | 30 hours/week | Paid weekly via Remitly



?? This is NOT a greenfield build. The app already exists and is in active development. I am looking for a reliable, skilled React Native developer who can take ownership of their work, write clean production-ready code, and help get GoShopBlack to launch.



? No major refactors

? No new features unless explicitly approved

? No “I rewrote everything” approaches



About GoShopBlack:

GoShopBlack is a marketplace mobile app that connects users with Black-owned businesses. The app is built in React Native with a Supabase backend and has draft builds on both Google Play and the Apple App Store. I do regular code reviews via GitHub and expect PRs to be tested, clean, and production-ready before submission. This is a long-term position for the right person — not a one-off project.



What You'll Be Working On:

- Ongoing React Native development for iOS & Android

- Search and filter system by location, category, and business type

- Google Maps API integration (not yet built — this is a key upcoming feature)

- Business profiles (hours, contact info, website links, reviews)

- Customer ratings and review system

- Business submission and admin approval flow

- E-commerce integration for businesses that sell online

- Social login 
 & Gmail) plus
/password auth

- Phase 2: push notifications, in-app messaging, ad integration, AI recommendations



What I'm Looking For:

- Strong hands-on React Native experience — you must show me apps you have shipped to the App Store and Google Play

- Strong Supabase experience — this is our backend, no Firebase, Node.js, or AWS

- Google Maps API integration experience

- GitHub proficiency — include your GitHub profile in your application

- Clean, well-structured code with no demo or test code in PRs

- Someone who self-tests thoroughly and does full end-to-end testing before submitting a PR

- Strong communicator who gives daily updates and flags issues early

- Weekly proof of progress required (Git commits, test builds, or screen recordings)

- Willingness to use Hubstaff for time tracking from day one

- Willingness to sign an NDA and contract before starting

- Fluent written and spoken English



How We Work:

- 30 hours per week

- Daily check-ins and progress updates required

- PRs must be fully tested and production-ready before submission

- Time tracked via Hubstaff

- Payment sent weekly via Remitly



Screening Questions (answer all 5 in your application):

1. You are taking over an existing React Native app mid-project. What are the first 3 things you check before making any code changes, and why?

2. If you had 2 weeks to prepare an existing mobile app for launch, what would you prioritize — and what would you intentionally NOT touch? Explain your reasoning.

3. Describe one project where you inherited a messy, incomplete, or poorly documented app and successfully shipped it. What was broken and what did you do first?

4. How do you prove weekly progress on an existing project? Be specific (commits, builds, test links, screen recordings, etc.)

5. What React Native state management approaches have you used in production apps, and how do you d
 which one to use?



How to Apply:

Start your message with the word Love so I know you read this fully. Then answer all 5 screening questions above and include:

- Links to React Native apps you have built and shipped

- Your GitHub profile link

- Your availability and when you can start



Applications that do not start with Love, skip the screening questions, or do not include a portfolio and GitHub link will not be considered.



This is the video example -

title: Experienced, Xero-Proficient Management Accountant
description:
Job Description

Company: Priority Haulage Limited

Job Title: Management Accountant

Job Type: Remote / Part-Time

Reports to: Financial Controller

Start Date: May 2026



About Priority Haulage

Priority Haulage is a reputable and reliable heavy machinery and equipment transport business based in Auckland, New Zealand. We specialise in the safe and efficient transportation of a wide range of civil machinery and heavy access equipment. 



Our company motto, “Your Assets, Our Priority”, reflects our commitment to the secure and dependable movement of our clients’ valuable machinery. We take pride in delivering a high level of client satisfaction through trusted service and operational excellence.



Job Summary

Priority Haulage is seeking a capable and detail-oriented Management Accountant (Part-Time) to support the delivery of accurate and timely month-end financial reporting.



Working closely with the Financial Operations Manager and reporting to the Financial Controller, this role is responsible for maintaining financial integrity across core accounting processes, ensuring reliable data to support operational decision-making within a fast-paced, growing transport business.



This position is suited to someone highly proficient in Xero, comfortable working independently, and experienced in structured month-end close environments.



Job Responsibilities Overview

This is a hands-on, execution-focused role centred on the monthly financial close. The primary responsibility is to ensure all financial data is processed, reconciled, and reported accurately and on time each month.



The role requires availability for 1–2 days prior to month-end for close preparation, and approximately 8 working days post month-end to complete the close cycle. This is expected to equate to approximately 15–25 hours per month, with specific scheduling aligned to month-end requirements and agreed with the successful candidate. 



The role requires strong technical accounting capability, attention to detail, and a disciplined approach to financial operations. Performance is measured by the accuracy and timeliness of reporting, adherence to internal processes, and the ability to consistently deliver high-quality outputs with minimal supervision.



Over time, there may be opportunities to contribute to financial analysis, system/process improvements, and data alignment initiatives, based on capability and demonstrated performance.



Job Responsibilities

•	Prepare and analyse monthly management accounts using Xero and CCH Workpapers, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timeliness. 

•	Perform key account reconciliations and resolve discrepancies prior to month-end close.

•	Ensure all financial activities comply with New Zealand accounting standards and tax requirements.

•	Maintain accurate financial records, filing systems, and data integrity in line with company standards 

•	Contribute to continuous improvement of financial processes, with a focus on efficiency and consistency.



Required Experience & Capability

Applicants should demonstrate proven experience operating in a structured, deadline-driven finance environment.



•	Minimum 7+ years’ hands-on accounting experience.

•	CPA qualification required, preferably a Regular Member of PICPA, with a recognised tertiary qualification in accounting.

•	Proven experience preparing monthly management accounts, conducting financial analysis, and supporting budgeting and forecasting processes.

•	Advanced proficiency in Xero is essential.

•	Strong Microsoft Excel capability, with proven ability to reconcile and analyse data using XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH, pivot tables, and financial modelling functions.

•	Working knowledge of New Zealand tax regulations, accounting standards, and statutory compliance requirements.

•	Demonstrated ability to operate independently in a remote environment, with strong self-management, reliability, and a consistent track record of meeting deadlines without oversight.

•	Strong ability to collaborate cross-functionally, supporting finance-related workflows across the business.

•	High level of technical proficiency, including the Microsoft platform, with working familiarity in modern business tools such as:

o	Notion

o	ChatGPT



Preferred Experience 

•	Experience within New Zealand or Australian Chartered Accounting firms, including use of CCH Workpapers.

•	Exposure to a commercial business environment, ideally within transport, logistics, or fleet-based operations.

•	A relevant tertiary qualification in finance, business administration, or a related field.



Personal Attributes

•	Highly organised and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple responsibilities reliably.

•	Strong communication and interpersonal skills, able to operate autonomously while contributing effectively in a remote team environment.

•	Analytical and problem-solving capability, particularly in identifying, investigating, and resolving financial discrepancies.

•	Proactive and improvement-oriented, with the ability to adapt, optimise workflows, and navigate operational change.

•	Professional, client-focused mindset, demonstrating integrity, quality standards, and accountability in delivery.



Required Equipment and Setup

•	Dedicated Workspace: Quiet, distraction-free home office suitable for video calls and focused work.

•	Computer Requirements (Desktop PC or Laptop):

o	Processor: Intel Core i5 or better.

o	RAM: Minimum 8GB (16GB preferred).

o	Operating System: Windows 10/11, compatible with required business software.

o	Internet: Stable high-speed connection (minimum 10 Mbps download/upload).

•	Monitor Setup: Dual monitors preferred, or a laptop paired with an external monitor.

•	Headset: Noise-cancelling for clear communication during virtual meetings.

•	Webcam: High-quality external or integrated camera for video calls.

•	Power Backup: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or generator ensuring at least 3 hours of operational uptime during outages.

•	Internet Backup: Secondary internet connection (e.g., mobile data or alternative wireless) for uninterrupted connectivity.



Application Requirement

In your application submission, include the word “Motivated!” in the title.

title: Job Title Weekly Vlog Editor — Travel & Lifestyle YouTube Channel
description:
We are a travel and lifestyle YouTube channel looking for a reliable long-term vlog editor. This is a consistent, ongoing role — 1 vlog per week, every week.



Communications will be MOST important! More than editing ability. We are looking for someone that will be proactive in updating us without us having to ask. 

Responsibilities:



- Edit 4 long-form vlogs per month (1 per week)

- Each vlog is compiled from approximately 1 hour of raw footage per day, shot over 4–7 days (expect 4–7+ hours of total raw footage per video)

- Final video should be under 35 minutes — you will not use most of the footage, and that's expected

- Select the strongest 
nts to build a natural, engaging narrative

- Focus on pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention — not just assembling clips

- Clean audio, music selection, and sound mixing

- Add captions and minimal clean text where needed

- Sync voiceover if provided

- Complete each video within 3–5 days of receiving footage



Tools Preferred:

Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or LumaFusion

Compensation:

mbers

title: WordPress Developer — Reverse Proxy Blog Migration
description:
WordPress Developer — Reverse Proxy Blog Migration

Squarespace to WordPress on WP Engine

Overview

We need an experienced WordPress developer to migrate a blog (~850 pages) from Squarespace to WordPress on WP Engine. The main website stays on Squarespace — only the blog moves. A Cloudflare Worker reverse proxy will route blog traffic (/blog/*) to WordPress while all other traffic continues to Squarespace. All existing blog URLs must remain identical after migration.

This is not a standard WordPress build. The reverse proxy routing is the core technical challenge.

Scope of Work

1. WP Engine Setup. Provision WordPress environment, configure theme, install required plugins. Set up permalink structure to match existing blog URLs exactly. The site has two URL patterns: flat slugs (/blog/post-slug) and date-based paths (/blog/2024/10/19/post-slug). Both must resolve correctly.

2. Content Migration. Export content from Squarespace (WXR format), import into WordPress. Write and run scripts to download all images from Squarespace’s CDN, upload to WordPress media library, and rewrite all image URLs in post content. Verify all 850+ post slugs match the originals.

3. Cloudflare Worker & DNS. Move domain nameservers to Cloudflare. Write and deploy a Cloudflare Worker that routes /blog/* requests to WP Engine and passes all other requests through to Squarespace. Configure proper Host headers, X-Forwarded-Proto, and SSL end-to-end.

4. WordPress Proxy Configuration. Configure 
p for reverse proxy operation (WP_HOME, WP_SITEURL, forwarded headers). Ensure WordPress generates correct URLs through the proxy. No redirect loops, no mixed content.

5. URL Verification & QA. Verify every migrated URL returns HTTP 200 through the proxy. Test for redirect loops, broken images, mixed content warnings, and correct canonical URLs. Deliver a QA report covering all pages.

Required Experience

•  Cloudflare Workers — you’ve written and deployed them before, not just used Cloudflare for DNS

•  Reverse proxy configuration — routing subdirectory traffic to a different origin server

•  WP Engine hosting — familiar with their portal, domain config, caching, and SFTP/SSH access

•  WordPress 
p for proxy setups — forwarded headers, WP_HOME vs WP_SITEURL

•  Large-scale content migration — 850+ pages including scripted image re-hosting

•  SSL/HTTPS configuration across proxied setups

•  WP-CLI proficiency

Project Details

Budget: $1,500–$2,500 fixed price (open to discussion based on experience)

Timeline: 3–4 weeks

Type: Contract / project-based, with potential for ongoing WordPress maintenance

Communication: Async via Slack or
. Weekly progress updates. You’ll work directly with our SEO lead who will provide technical direction and review work at each phase.



To Apply

Please include:

1. A specific example of a reverse proxy or Cloudflare Worker project you’ve completed. Describe the setup, not just “I’ve done it.”

2. A specific example of a large content migration (100+ pages), ideally Squarespace to WordPress.

3. Your availability to start and estimated completion timeline.

4. Your fixed-price quote for the full scope described above.
